clientMessages.author: max.hastings
clientMessages.content:
<@835366914469396500> I hope you're doing well, good morning.

I saw the ads have been paused recently because these cards are getting declined. Good news is when they're running, they perform very well, we're getting leads for like 30-40 dollars on average which is great for your types of projects. 

Are you able to approve that with the bank?

Also, one more thing. You mentioned there were some jobs you closed, and you're working on some solid estimates right now, and have some follow ups. First, let this message be a reminder to not forget about those follow ups haha. Second, can you please give me the information about the jobs you closed and who you're giving estimates to? This is important to understand what's happening to the leads. 

For example:
Mike:
- contract size: 10k
- status: sent estimate, waiting on tax return
Linda: 
- contract size: 5k
- status: closed, project completed

This will help me a lot to continue optimizing this for you. Thanks!
